headline: Clear calendar and no inbound signals — use today to drive the 'no ground truth' evals design doc forward before it stalls.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so dashboards are live for tomorrow

must_make_progress.task: Set a target due date on AE-1079 and move it to In Progress

must_communicate_with.about: Align on approach for generated evaluations without ground truth — get their input on feasibility and model-graded eval techniques before finalizing design doc
Sync on evals adoption status and how no-ground-truth evals fit with validation patterns (DeepRAG, BatchTransform)

must_report_status.to: Agents leadership (referenced in Big Rock TR)

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix urgently.
Snowflake credentials empty — product telemetry and funnel metrics are inaccessible. Cannot track March/April adoption numbers referenced in OKRs.
AE-1079 has no due date and is still in 'To Do' — risk of it drifting given it's a key evals deliverable for 26.4.
Autopilot is flagged Yellow/Risk in OKRs — monitor whether your evals work intersects with blockers there.

outcomes.business_impact: No business-impacting actions completed yet today; priority is restoring observability (Salesforce/Snowflake) and advancing the evals design doc that underpins agent quality for 26.4.
outcomes.product_adoption: Adoption metrics currently unavailable due to broken data connections; the no-ground-truth evals design doc (AE-1079) is the key adoption-enabling deliverable to advance today.

slack_summary: Clear day with no meetings or inbound — best use of time is driving the no-ground-truth evals design doc (AE-1079) forward since it's your only active ticket and a key 26.4 deliverable. Top urgent items: (1) fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth so you regain visibility on escalations and metrics, (2) set a due date on AE-1079 and move it to In Progress. Zero meetings today.
